title: Please make Formula Column Expression Window BIGGER
excerpt: Hello. My idea is simple. Please make the formula column’s expression builder window MUCH bigger, or at least the ability to resize it. It takes no time at all for formulas to be bigger than the meager three lines allott…

posts.author: deceiver08 (Devin Doring)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello. My idea is simple. Please make the formula column’s expression builder window MUCH bigger, or at least the ability to resize it. It takes no time at all for formulas to be bigger than the meager three lines allotted, making it extremely frustrating to create more complex expressions. It’s dumb having to create larger formulas in a text editor only because there is a lack of input form “real estate”.
FAQs - “Can formula expression window get larger?”

posts.author: mfjramirezf (Marcos Ramírez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agree with this!
Please make it bigger

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agree!

Let’s compare?

Formula window

image604×512 17.9 KB

AI Window

image730×853 57.9 KB

The formula window needs to be updated to fit this AI window format, it is a pain to search for functions and columns.

Look how little space we get to work:

Another issue:


And the AI Assistant had to remain after testing the suggestion, because it’s impossible to choose thumbs (up / down) if we don’t test it… And after testing, the AI assistant window vanishes.

Or this: a small window at the top right with the result of the formula; this way we don’t need to close the formula window for analise the results.

Hope we can get this updates!

Requests:

  1. Make the formula window bigger
  2. Fix the AI evaluation issue

Thanks for reading!
